NEOW: Taking '1 HP enemies for 3 combats'. At A9, early hallway fights cost 5-15 HP each; this saves ~20-30 HP and gives 3 free card rewards. Bonus: if the map allows an elite as combat #2 or #3, that's a FREE RELIC. Boss relic swap is too volatile (could lose healing for Sozu/Cursed Key), and -8 max HP at A9 is a real cost. WIN%: 55% (baseline A9 Ironclad). WHY: standard start, good Neow pick.

events.translated: [ Enemies in your next three combats have 1 HP ]

events.reasoning: ACT 1 ROUTE PLAN: Right side. F1 M(x=5) > F2 M(x=6) > F3 M(x=6) — all three FREE via Neow's Lament (1 HP enemies). Then F4 M(x=6), F5 M(x=5) for real fights with a 4-reward deck, F6 REST(x=4), F7 ELITE(x=5) at full HP, F8 M, F9 Treasure, then decide: second elite at F11(x=6) via F10 Unknown if HP/deck strong, else F10 M > F11 Rest. F15 Rest before Slime Boss. 5 monster rooms before first elite, rest immediately before it — ledger clears. Boss is Slime Boss: AOE (Cleave/Thunderclap/Immolate) and Evolve become high priority in drafting. WIN%: 55% (=). WHY: solid route with free elite-prep.

FIGHT STRATEGY — Lagavulin. TYPE: Elite (race + block hybrid). WIN CONDITION: Wake it T1 by breaking HP (25 attack dmg vs 8 block = 17 HP), exploit the stun turn T2 for free damage, then alternate Rampage scaling + full block vs its 18-20 dmg attacks. Watch Siphon Soul (-1 Str/Dex permanent). KEY CARDS: Rampage (scales each play), Inflame, Wild Strike. POTION PLAN: Dex Potion once attack cycle starts (+2/Defend). RISKS: Siphon stacking makes late blocking weak — must win by ~turn 8. WIN%: 55% (=). WHY: full HP, decent matchup.

events.text: RECALL -- Slime Boss, layer:heuristics, bosses/Slime Boss

events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY — Slime Boss (A9, ~154 HP). TYPE: Boss — spend HP for kill speed. WIN CONDITION: T1-T2 are free (Goop Spray/Preparing). Build Str (Inflame), Shockwave vuln, attack hard. Time the split: drop it below 50% ON its Slam turn so it splits instead of Slamming (dodges 38 dmg), and as LOW as possible since both L slimes spawn at its current HP. Post-split: Whirlwind AOE, spread damage, kill both in quick succession. KEY CARDS: Whirlwind, Inflame, Shockwave, Rampage. POTIONS: Power Potion early if it's a good power; Skill Potion flex. RISKS: Slimed flood clogging draws; uneven split kills. WIN%: 60% (+5). WHY: 94% HP, AOE + Str online, 1 upgrade. Boss is the weakest Act 1 boss for this deck.

ACT 2 PLAN: F1 M(x=3) > F2 M(x=3) > F3 SHOP (remove Strikes, buy healing/scaling — 266g) > F4 M(x=4) > F5 M(x=5) > F6 ELITE(x=4) > F7 (M x=4) > F8 (Elite x=4 if HP allows, else M) > F9 Treasure > F10 REST > F11-F14 monsters > F15 REST > Automaton. Non-combat by F3 ✓, elite 1-2 ✓, rest before boss ✓. Boss needs block scaling or burst — shop priorities: healing card/relic, block scaling, Strike removal. WIN%: 62% (+2). WHY: cheap boss kill, Runic Pyramid + Limit Break acquired, 96% HP into Act 2.

RECOVERY: CommunicationMod froze on a cancel command at the purge screen; game restarted, save restored from backup, run resumed at F20 shop. Shopping redone (Demon Form + Pommel Strike + Strike removal). Plan unchanged: F4 M(x=4) > F5 M(x=5) > F6 ELITE(x=4) > F7/F8 by HP > F9 Treasure > F10 Rest. WIN%: 62% (=). WHY: no game-state loss, deck 24 cards with DF+LB scaling, Pyramid.
